title: Web-to-Cloud: OCI Audit Cloud Abuse
description: Filters OCI Audit for cloud discovery and Object Storage actions associated with the compromised service identity and web-to-cloud Trace ID.
query: 'Log Source' = 'OCI Audit Logs' and ('Trace ID' = 'trace_w2c_entry_001' or 'User Name' = 'compromised-svc@corp.example.com' or 'Resource Name' like '*prod-customer-backups*') | stats count as AuditEvents, unique('Event Type') as EventTypes, unique('Resource Name') as Resources by 'User Name', 'Source IP', Status | sort -AuditEvents

ask_ai_prompts: Which OCI Audit actions prove cloud control-plane abuse?
Identify the bucket and object names touched by the compromised identity.
